revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Primary source inline]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research#Primary, secondary and tertiary sources | text = non-primary source{{#if:{{{plural|}}}|s|}} needed | class = noprint Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This claim needs references to reliable secondary sources.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = {{#if:{{{demo|}}}{{{nocat|}}}||}} | cat-date = {{#if:{{{demo|}}}{{{nocat|}}}||Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research#Primary, secondary and tertiary sources | text = non-primary source{{#if:{{{plural|}}}|s|}} needed | class = noprint Template-Fact | title = {{{reason|This claim needs references to reliable secondary sources.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = {{#if:{{{demo|}}}{{{nocat|}}}||}} | cat-date = {{#if:{{{demo|}}}{{{nocat|}}}||Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
